config.py.suggested_code:
import os

class ServerConfig:
    PORT = int(os.getenv("PORT", 8000))
    HOST = os.getenv("HOST", "127.0.0.1")
    DEBUG = os.getenv("DEBUG", "True").lower() in ("true", "1")
    DATABASE_URL = os.getenv("DATABASE_URL", "sqlite:///db.sqlite")
